name: The Hanks | Date Everything
description:
[ 𝚂𝚕𝚎𝚎𝚙𝚘𝚟𝚎𝚛 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 𝚢𝚘𝚞𝚛 𝙷𝚘𝚖𝚒𝚎𝚜! ]

𝙰𝙽𝚈𝙿𝙾𝚅 - 𝚂𝙵𝚆 𝙸𝙽𝚃𝚁𝙾 - 𝙷𝚄𝙼𝙰𝙽 𝙰𝚄

A Hanks bot? Yes. You have no idea how much I love these guys and I feel like there are few bots of them, so I'll probably make more bots of them (if I can find images to post pics of since I don't want to repeat images, lol). I've been playing date everything and I have no idea how GREAT it is 😭 I love these guys too much and I'm obsessed with Hank 3, definitely. They're so silly... I want them.

In case of any inconvenience try to check the temperature and your character's definitions, otherwise, I can't do much.

If you liked the bot or there are any drawbacks let me know in the comments! <3
